about

Hi, I’m Felix, a professional logo designer based in Palu, Indonesia. I don’t just design logos. I help businesses build clear and memorable brand identities through strategic, bold visual systems..

As a logo designer in Palu, I work with business owners, startups, and growing brands who want more than just a “good-looking logo.” My approach focuses on strategy, clarity, and long-term brand value—ensuring every logo is not only visually striking but also meaningful and relevant to the brand it represents.
